title: asplenium auritum var. auriculatum
intro: Asplenium auritum var. auriculatum, also known as golden spleenwort, is a variety of the Asplenium auritum plant, a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Asplenium auritum var. auriculatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may also be added to topical creams or salves for skin conditions.
